Module org.tquadrat.foundation.mgmt

module org.tquadrat.foundation.mgmt
The module for the JMX extensions by the Foundation Library.
Version:
$Id: module-info.java 995 2022-01-23 01:09:35Z tquadrat $
Open Issues (The ToDo List):
  • 2022-01-21 – Implement the JMX extensions
  • 2022-01-21 – Validate the generated Javadocs
